purpose: Chronological thesis milestone snapshots for LeGPS. Each file freezes the project status, evidence, risks, and next steps at a specific point in time.

policy.update_rule: Do not overwrite old milestones. Add a new milestone file and update latest_milestone when the thesis state meaningfully changes.
policy.scope: Milestones should capture interpretation, evidence status, known risks, and next steps. They should not store API keys or private credentials.

milestones.title: Project status after canonical reproducibility and first RQ4 ablation
milestones.summary: The project has a working LeGPS prototype, canonical reproducibility for five games, and first optimizer-ablation evidence, but still lacks seeded reruns, systematic shortcut tests, and broader environment coverage.

milestones.title: Local canonical reproducibility command unblocked and rerun
milestones.summary: The documented API-free canonical evaluation command now runs from a fresh local setup, all five canonical policies reproduced their stored 10000-step scores exactly on macOS, and an RQ1 seeded-rerun aggregation script is ready.

milestones.title: First completed RQ1 seeded rerun suite
milestones.summary: A five-game seeded RQ1 rerun completed. Pong matched canonical performance, Breakout exceeded the current canonical score, and Freeway, Asterix, and Skiing were below canonical, making this useful mixed stability evidence.

milestones.title: LLM input/output audit logging
milestones.summary: Future LeGPS outer-loop runs now save exact LLM system prompts, user prompts, raw responses, and extracted outputs under each game run's llm_io directory, improving auditability when provider-level seed control is unavailable.

milestones.title: Kangaroo onboarding unblocked
milestones.summary: Kangaroo is now selectable in the LeGPS single-game loop and unified suite runner with measured 440-feature prompt context, while the canonical default suite remains the existing five games.

milestones.title: First Kangaroo smoke run completed
milestones.summary: The first LLM-generated Kangaroo smoke run completed with saved llm_io audit artifacts and valid policy code, but scored 0.0 in both the 1000-step smoke evaluation and a 10000-step API-free follow-up check.

milestones.title: Kangaroo UP-only failure diagnosed
milestones.summary: The first zero-score Kangaroo policy was diagnosed as an UP-only controller with no horizontal movement, no reward events, and one life lost. A reusable Kangaroo renderer and logger metrics were added for future repair attempts.

milestones.title: Second Kangaroo smoke run exposed horizontal-only failure
milestones.summary: The second Kangaroo smoke run completed with two LLM iterations and full LLM audit artifacts. It avoided the pure UP-only failure but overcorrected into horizontal dithering, still scoring 0.0.

milestones.title: Kangaroo route context refined
milestones.summary: After two zero-score Kangaroo smoke runs, the prompt, feedback rules, and demo policy now define ladder reachability using player-bottom and ladder-bottom alignment, including the Level 1 first-ladder sanity check.

milestones.title: Third Kangaroo smoke run produced first score
milestones.summary: The third Kangaroo smoke run produced the first nonzero Kangaroo LeGPS score, but a 16-episode 10000-step API-free follow-up averaged only 12.5, so Kangaroo remains exploratory and not yet covered.

milestones.title: Kangaroo resume run stabilized first reward
milestones.summary: A resume-style Kangaroo run from smoke3 produced policy_v3, which scored 200.0 in all eight run-evaluation episodes and averaged 162.5 over a 16-episode 10000-step follow-up, but still plateaus at one reward event.

milestones.title: Kangaroo resume2 stabilized the 200-point plateau
milestones.summary: A second Kangaroo continuation produced policy_v6, which scored exactly 200.0 in all 16 episodes of a 10000-step follow-up, but the trace shows this is still one reward event followed by a life loss.

milestones.title: Kangaroo post-200 route trace
milestones.summary: A detailed policy_v6 trace shows the 200-point reward comes from RIGHTFIRE at x≈132,y≈148, then the policy stalls near x≈132,y≈132 until a falling coconut causes life loss.

milestones.title: Kangaroo trace-guided continuation regressed
milestones.summary: A targeted continuation from policy_v6 generated policy_v7, but policy_v7 scored 0.0; the retained best remains policy_v6 at the stable 200-point plateau.

milestones.title: Kangaroo debug overlay confirmed ladder-overlap failure
milestones.summary: A new debug renderer shows policy_v6 chose UP from on_ladder_column_climb 212 times, including 193 times with only one pixel of player-ladder overlap; longer evaluation and a parameter-only retune stayed at 200.

milestones.title: Kangaroo parametric ladder patch breaks the 200-point plateau
milestones.summary: A trace-guided API-free patch separated strict ladder perception from route-column exclusion; the retuned patch-2 candidate reached mean 2656.25 over 128 episodes with a 50000-step cap, but remains exploratory rather than canonical.

milestones.title: Kangaroo retuned trace comparison reveals punch farming
milestones.summary: Exact replay of one 3600-point and one 200-point retuned patch-2 episode shows zero UP actions in both traces; the high score comes from repeated RIGHTFIRE monkey rewards on the lower platform, not robust ladder climbing.

milestones.title: Kangaroo anti-punch-farming feedback added
milestones.summary: Kangaroo prompt context and logger feedback now explicitly flag score-without-climbing and punch-farming behavior, so future outer-loop runs are pushed toward ladder-route progress instead of the lower-platform monkey shortcut.

milestones.title: Kangaroo anti-punch overcorrection diagnosed and fixed
milestones.summary: The anti-punch-farming Kangaroo outer loop produced five zero-score rewrites by suppressing the first useful RIGHTFIRE branch; prompt and logger feedback now distinguish punch farming from first-reward suppression.

milestones.title: Kangaroo preservation contract added after failed rerun
milestones.summary: A fresh Kangaroo rerun still failed to beat the 200-point baseline, so the prompt now treats the lower-platform route, monkey-threat detection, and first RIGHTFIRE branch as hard preservation constraints.

milestones.title: Kangaroo fresh run reaches unstable 200-point policy
milestones.summary: A from-scratch Kangaroo run using the revised architecture recovered a 200-point first-reward policy, but a 32-episode 10000-step follow-up averaged only 93.75 and never exceeded 200.

milestones.title: Kangaroo shaped objective scaffold added
milestones.summary: Kangaroo now has an optional shaped route-progress search objective and a fresh-run launcher; real reward remains the reported and best-policy selection metric.

milestones.title: Kangaroo shaped run stabilizes 200-point plateau
milestones.summary: The first shaped-objective Kangaroo run stabilized the first 200-point reward in 31 of 32 standardized follow-up episodes, but no episode exceeded 200 and the trace still shows one reward event followed by life loss.

milestones.title: Kangaroo shaped policy debug stack
milestones.summary: The debug renderer now explains the shaped run's policy_v2 exactly; the trace shows post-200 failure is repeated monkey_in_punch_priority RIGHTFIRE overriding ladder/dismount behavior until life loss.

milestones.title: Kangaroo post-200 guard probe
milestones.summary: Two local post-200 guard patches preserved the 200-point plateau but did not exceed it; action probes show the policy enters a ladder-top state where no atomic action can escape before life loss.

milestones.title: Kangaroo top-ladder transition probe
milestones.summary: A bounded sequence probe from the y=140 post-reward state found no short forced action block above 200; the best short prefix delays failure but still dies at the same ladder-top trap under longer replay.
